title: Review Reply Pack for Local Business
hidden_buyer_pain: The owner knows reviews matter but avoids replying because it takes time and feels awkward.
what_this_really_means: Draft human-sounding owner replies to real customer reviews. The owner approves and posts them.
why_beginners_miss_it: It does not look like an AI job, but AI can speed up the drafting while the human checks tone and details.
smallest_paid_offer: 20 review replies drafted in the business voice.
suggested_first_message: I can draft 20 review replies for your business in a friendly, professional tone. You approve them before anything is posted.
questions_to_ask: How many reviews do you want replies for?
What tone should the replies use?
Are there any reviews that need extra care?
red_flags: buyer wants you to post without approval
boundary_note: Draft replies only. Do not write fake reviews and do not request account access.
what_not_to_promise: Do not promise higher ratings or search ranking changes.
local_tool_option: LibreOffice Writer for offline drafting if needed.
cloud_tool_option: Google Docs for easy owner review.
paid_upgrade_options: Grammarly Pro only if doing lots of writing work
privacy_boundary: Use only public review text or owner-provided examples. Do not collect private customer data.
license_note: No special license issue if drafting original replies.
export_format: Google Doc or plain text table
human_review_step: Business owner approves every reply before posting.

title: Old PDF to Clean Spreadsheet
hidden_buyer_pain: The buyer has useful information trapped in old PDFs, menus, rosters, forms, or lists.
what_this_really_means: Move information into a clean spreadsheet with clear columns and rows.
why_beginners_miss_it: It looks boring, but boring cleanup is often exactly what small businesses will pay to avoid.
smallest_paid_offer: Convert one small PDF into a clean spreadsheet.
suggested_first_message: I can turn your small PDF or list into a clean spreadsheet with clear columns. I’ll confirm the fields first so the scope stays fixed.
questions_to_ask: Is it scanned or selectable text?
boundary_note: Confirm file size, fields, and sensitivity before accepting.
what_not_to_promise: Do not promise perfect OCR from poor scans without checking the file.
local_tool_option: LibreOffice plus local copy/paste cleanup for private files.
cloud_tool_option: Google Sheets for shared review when data is non-sensitive.
paid_upgrade_options: paid OCR only if the PDF is scanned or messy
privacy_boundary: Avoid uploading sensitive files to random web converters.
security_note: Do not accept private financial, medical, or legal records without a safer workflow.
human_review_step: Buyer checks sample rows before full cleanup continues.

title: FAQ Draft Pack for Small Service Business
hidden_buyer_pain: The business keeps answering the same questions over and over.
what_this_really_means: Turn repeated customer questions into a simple FAQ the owner can use on a website, message reply, or handout.
why_beginners_miss_it: It feels too basic, but it saves owners time quickly.
smallest_paid_offer: 10 FAQ questions and answers from owner-provided notes.
suggested_first_message: I can turn your repeated customer questions into a clean FAQ draft you can approve and use on your website or messages.
questions_to_ask: Are there answers you already use?
boundary_note: Owner must approve final answers before publishing.
what_not_to_promise: Do not promise legal, medical, financial, or ranking outcomes.
privacy_boundary: Use general business questions, not private customer cases.
license_note: Original drafted copy based on owner-provided facts.
human_review_step: Owner confirms all answers before use.

title: Canva Flyer or One-Sheet Cleanup
hidden_buyer_pain: The business already has a rough flyer but it looks cluttered or unclear.
what_this_really_means: Clean the wording and layout of a simple flyer or one-page handout.
why_beginners_miss_it: It is not full design agency work. It is cleanup, which is easier to sell and deliver.
smallest_paid_offer: Clean up one flyer or handout.
suggested_first_message: I can clean up your existing flyer so it is easier to read and looks more professional. You provide the facts and I’ll keep the design simple.
questions_to_ask: Do you already have a flyer?
What is the main call to action?
boundary_note: Use buyer-provided assets or clearly licensed assets.
what_not_to_promise: Do not promise professional branding strategy or ad performance.
local_tool_option: LibreOffice Draw only for very basic offline layout.
cloud_tool_option: Canva free for easiest beginner workflow.
paid_upgrade_options: Canva Pro if brand kit, premium assets, or repeated design work is needed
privacy_boundary: Do not use private customer info on public flyers unless the business has permission.
license_note: Use owner-owned logos/photos or Canva-licensed/free assets.
security_note: No business account login needed; work from shared assets or duplicate templates.
human_review_step: Owner approves final wording and layout.

title: AI Response Evaluator
estimated_pay_range: $10-$60/hour depending on platform and skill area
hidden_buyer_pain: AI companies need humans to compare outputs and explain which answer is better.
what_this_really_means: You rate or compare model answers using platform rules. Work can be inconsistent.
why_beginners_miss_it: It sounds like easy AI work, but qualification tests and task availability can be unpredictable.
smallest_paid_offer: Complete one qualification or small paid evaluation batch if terms are clear.
suggested_first_message: Not usually a buyer message job. Read the platform terms, qualification rules, payment rules, and task expectations before starting.
questions_to_ask: Can the platform withhold rejected work?
boundary_note: Treat as possible flexible work, not guaranteed income.
what_not_to_promise: Do not treat platform claims as stable income.
local_tool_option: Local notes or spreadsheet for tracking accepted/rejected tasks.
privacy_boundary: Do not paste platform-confidential tasks into outside tools unless allowed.
license_note: Follow platform content and confidentiality terms.
security_note: Do not pay upfront and do not move money for anyone.
human_review_step: User reviews platform terms before spending time.

title: Marketplace Listing Cleanup
hidden_buyer_pain: Sellers have products but weak titles and confusing descriptions.
what_this_really_means: Rewrite listing titles and descriptions using seller-provided facts.
why_beginners_miss_it: It looks like simple writing, but sellers often need this done in batches.
suggested_first_message: I can clean up 10 listing titles and descriptions using your product facts so buyers understand them faster.
local_tool_option: LibreOffice Calc and Writer for offline cleanup.
human_review_step: Seller confirms all product claims before posting.
